tool_args.label: Project goals for Hylan Boulevard study
tool_args.raw_text: Improve traffic flow, Reduce bus travel time and improve reliability, Improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn and to Staten Island destinations, Improve safety for all corridor users

payload.claim_text: Project Goals: Improve traffic flow, reduce bus travel time and improve reliability, improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn and to Staten Island destinations, improve safety for all corridor users
payload.description: Project goals of the Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Goals
■ Improve traffic flow ■ Reduce bus travel time and improve reliability ■ Improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn and to Staten Island destinations ■ Improve safety for all corridor users

tool_args.label: Concerns from CAC and public meeting 2010-2011
tool_args.raw_text: Concerns from CAC and Public Meeting Issues Raised in 2010-11 - Reduce congestion, Improve safety for drivers and pedestrians, Enforce traffic regulations, Buses are too slow, Maintain on-street parking, More time for pedestrians to cross, Provide sidewalks

payload.claim_text: Community concerns raised in 2010-11 include: reduce congestion, improve safety for drivers and pedestrians, enforce traffic regulations more aggressively, buses are too slow, maintain on-street parking and delivery access for businesses, provide more time for pedestrians to cross Hylan Boulevard, provide sidewalks where none exist
payload.description: Issues raised by CAC (Community Advisory Committee) and public meeting attendees

evidence_refs.source_quote: Concerns from CAC and Public Meeting Issues Raised in 2010-11

■ Reduce congestion ■ Improve safety for drivers and pedestrians ■ Enforce traffic regulations more aggressively ■ Buses are too slow ■ Maintain on-street parking and delivery access for businesses ■ Provide more time for pedestrians to cross Hylan Boulevard ■ Provide sidewalks where none exist

tool_args.label: Concept development guidelines
tool_args.raw_text: Concept Development Guidelines - Focus on quick improvements, Build on left-turn lane projects, No roadway widening, Maintain parking and deliveries

payload.claim_text: Concept development guidelines: focus on improvements that can be implemented quickly and that do not adversely affect safety or traffic flow, build on left-turn lane improvement projects being implemented starting 2011, no roadway widening unless significant benefits are likely, maintain on-street parking and deliveries for businesses
payload.description: Guidelines for developing the corridor concept plan

evidence_refs.source_quote: Concept Development Guidelines

■ Focus on improvements that can be implemented quickly and that do not adversely affect safety or traffic flow ■ Build on the left-turn lane improvement projects being implemented starting 2011 ■ No roadway widening unless significant benefits are likely ■ Maintain on-street parking and deliveries for businesses

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Traffic conditions AM and PM on Hylan corridor
tool_args.raw_text: AM: Congestion northbound between Guyon and Seaver Avenues. PM: Congestion heaviest at New Dorp Lane and Tysens Lane.

payload.claim_text: A.M.: Congestion occurs primarily northbound between Guyon and Seaver Avenues. Most other intersections operate well. Traffic flows better southbound. P.M.: Congestion is heaviest at New Dorp Lane and Tysens Lane. Most other intersections operate well. Traffic flows better northbound.
payload.description: Existing traffic conditions along Hylan Boulevard during AM and PM peak periods

evidence_refs.source_quote: Traffic Conditions – A.M.
■ Congestion occurs primarily northbound between Guyon and Seaver Avenues. ■ Most other intersections operate well. ■ Traffic flows better southbound.
Traffic Conditions – P.M.
■ Congestion is heaviest at New Dorp Lane and Tysens Lane ■ Most other intersections operate well. ■ Traffic flows better northbound.
